title: nvm_overwrite fails silently when object does not yet exist
description: nvm_overwrite calls nvm_delete unconditionally before the add. If the object does not already exist, nvm_delete returns WH_ERROR_NOTFOUND (or equivalent) and nvm_overwrite propagates that error without attempting the add — making it impossible to create a new NVM object via nvm_overwrite. The delete step should treat NOT_FOUND as success (object was already absent) and proceed to the add.
